About Quantfi
This perspective shaped how we built QuantFi.
Christian Sanford is a co-founder of QuantFi, where he helps PE- and VC-backed businesses build investor-grade finance functions, drive strategic clarity, and prepare for and execute transactions.
Christian Sanford is a co-founder of QuantFi, where he helps PE- and VC-backed businesses build investor-grade finance functions, drive strategic clarity, and prepare for and execute transactions.
Kenny Jen is a co-founder of QuantFi, where he leads financial strategy for investor-backed companies navigating scale, profitability, and capital allocation.
Prior to launching QuantFi, he served as a Fractional CFO for investor-backed companies, focusing on strategy, forecasting, and capital markets, and also executed M&A transactions for sponsors.
